label: RN Entry-Level Content Blueprint
description: Blueprint map for US RN (NCLEX-RN) and Canadian RN exam content. Each entry is a planned lesson+question unit covering high-yield RN domains at entry-level clinical complexity. Aligned to 2026 Next Generation NCLEX (NGN) question formats.

priorityWeightKey.4: High — frequently tested, core RN scope
priorityWeightKey.5: Critical — always tested, highest frequency on NCLEX/Canadian RN
